pi_items.source: Task description requirement: 'Create a vehicle profile named 'School Bus' for a bus-type vehicle'
Task description requirement for 'bus-type vehicle' and Sygic GPS documentation confirming BUS as valid vehicle type (https://www.sygic.com/what-is/vehicle-profiles)

Task description requirement: 'Diesel fuel' and Sygic documentation confirming DIESEL as supported fuel type (https://www.manula.com/manuals/sygic/sygic-gps-navigation-for-android-2-0/1/en/topic/fuel-type)

Task description requirement: 'Euro 6 emissions'; Sygic documentation confirms support for Euro 6 standards (https://www.sygic.com/press/sygic-announces-low-emission-zones-enhanced-incident-reporting-and-motorbike-mode-leveraging-the-navigation-experience); verifier accepts both 'EURO6' and 'EURO_6' formats

Task description requirement #1: 'Buses must always stop and discharge students while facing the same direction as traffic'; preference key 'preferenceKey_arriveInDrivingSide' used in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh confirms feature existence

Task description requirement #2: 'Lane guidance must be permanently active'; Sygic documentation confirms lane guidance is a real feature (https://www.manula.com/manuals/sygic/sygic-professional-navigation/28.0/en/topic/lane-guidance)

Task description requirement #3: 'School buses are prohibited from using ferry crossings'; Sygic documentation confirms avoid ferries is a real routing feature (https://www.manula.com/manuals/sygic/sygic-truck-navigation/1/en/topic/avoid)

Task description requirement #4: 'The district uses miles for all route planning'; setup_task.sh comment confirms '0' = Miles; README.md states 'Distance units = Miles (0)'; export_result.sh extracts this value from preferenceKey_regional_distanceUnitsFormat

privileged_info_summary: This task requires configuring Sygic GPS Navigation (com.sygic.aura) for school bus fleet safety compliance per Maplewood Unified School District policy. The task involves creating a new vehicle profile named 'School Bus' with specific technical specifications (BUS type, DIESEL fuel, 2020 production year, EURO6 emission category) and enabling four safety-critical GPS settings: arrive-in-direction (to ensure students don't cross in front of buses), lane guidance (for complex intersection navigation), avoid ferries (district liability exclusion), and distance units set to miles (for federal reimbursement compliance). All metadata claims are verified against the official task description, Sygic GPS documentation, and task automation scripts.
